creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Wen Heping from comment #45)

Thanks for adding test support Wen. Very surprised but relieved at only 7 failing tests. exp-run call is up to the person intending to commit and address possible fallout.

Still -1 on not using autoplist, we still have frequent QA failures due to this and a lack of comprehensive testing.

@Sunpoet/Wen Let's get a separate tracking issue up/created for broken shared macro removal. I also have a few other framework level tracking issues to create
